newThisWeek.name: Recraft V3
newThisWeek.tagline: AI design tool with vector superpowers
newThisWeek.description: Recraft is an AI-powered design tool that generates production-ready vector illustrations, icons, and 3D images from text prompts. Unlike raster-only generators, Recraft outputs clean SVGs you can edit in Figma or Illustrator. V3 introduced brand-consistent style controls and infinite canvas collaboration.
newThisWeek.pricing: Free tier available, Pro $25/mo, Team $40/mo per seat
newThisWeek.specialty: Vector illustration and icon generation with editable SVG output
newThisWeek.heroDescription: The first AI that generates production-ready vector art. Clean SVGs, editable icons, and brand-consistent illustrations from a single prompt.
pros: Vector illustration and icon generation with editable svg...
cons: Can be resource-intensive for large projects

newThisWeek.name: ElevenLabs
newThisWeek.description: ElevenLabs produces the most human-sounding AI speech available. Its voice cloning needs only seconds of audio to replicate any voice with emotional nuance, breathing patterns, and natural pacing. Used by audiobook publishers, game studios, and content creators for professional-grade voiceover.
newThisWeek.pricing: Free tier (10k chars/mo), Starter $5/mo, Creator $22/mo, Pro $99/mo
newThisWeek.specialty: Hyper-realistic voice cloning and multilingual text-to-speech
newThisWeek.heroDescription: Voice cloning so real it's uncanny. Seconds of audio is all it needs to replicate any voice with breathing, emotion, and perfect pacing.
pros: Hyper-realistic voice cloning and multilingual text-to-sp...

newThisWeek.name: Lovable
newThisWeek.tagline: Describe an app, get a full-stack product
newThisWeek.description: Lovable (formerly GPT Engineer) lets you describe any web application in plain English and generates a complete full-stack codebase with frontend, backend, database, auth, and deployment. It produces clean React + Supabase projects you can edit, extend, and ship to production.
newThisWeek.specialty: Full-stack app generation from natural language with deployable output
newThisWeek.heroDescription: Describe any app in plain English and get a full-stack codebase — frontend, backend, auth, database, deployed. Ship products in minutes, not months.
pros: Full-stack app generation from natural language with depl...

newThisWeek.name: HeyGen
newThisWeek.tagline: Create AI avatar videos in minutes
newThisWeek.description: HeyGen creates professional talking-head videos using photorealistic AI avatars. Choose from 100+ stock avatars or clone your own likeness. It handles lip sync, gestures, and natural eye movement, making it ideal for training videos, marketing content, and personalized outreach at scale.
newThisWeek.specialty: Photorealistic AI avatar video generation with custom cloning
pros: Photorealistic ai avatar video generation with custom clo...

newThisWeek.name: Bolt.new
newThisWeek.tagline: AI full-stack dev in your browser
newThisWeek.description: Bolt.new by StackBlitz lets you prompt, run, edit, and deploy full-stack web apps entirely in the browser. It uses WebContainers to run Node.js natively without a server, so you get instant previews and real package installs. Supports React, Next.js, Astro, and more.
newThisWeek.specialty: Browser-based full-stack development with instant previews
pros: Browser-based full-stack development with instant previews

newThisWeek.name: v0
newThisWeek.description: v0 by Vercel generates React UI components from text prompts or screenshots. It outputs clean, accessible code using shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS that you can copy directly into your project. Ideal for rapidly prototyping interfaces, landing pages, and dashboards.
newThisWeek.specialty: React UI component generation from prompts and screenshots
pros: React ui component generation from prompts and screenshots

newThisWeek.name: Napkin AI
newThisWeek.tagline: Turn text into visual diagrams instantly
newThisWeek.description: Napkin AI transforms written content into polished visual explanations — flowcharts, diagrams, infographics, and process maps — with one click. Paste any text and Napkin generates multiple visual options you can customize and export for presentations, docs, or social media.
newThisWeek.specialty: Automatic visual diagram and infographic generation from text
pros: Automatic visual diagram and infographic generation from ...

newThisWeek.name: Granola
newThisWeek.description: Granola sits quietly during your meetings and enhances your rough notes with full AI-powered context from the conversation. Unlike transcription tools, you keep writing your own notes — Granola just fills in the gaps, adds action items, and structures everything after the call ends.
newThisWeek.specialty: AI-enhanced meeting notes that augment your own writing
pros: Ai-enhanced meeting notes that augment your own writing
cons: Can be resource-intensive for large projects

newThisWeek.name: Luma Dream Machine
newThisWeek.tagline: Fast, high-quality AI video from text and images
newThisWeek.description: Luma Dream Machine generates surprisingly coherent video clips from text prompts or still images. It excels at cinematic camera movements, consistent characters, and natural lighting. Its speed and free tier make it one of the most accessible video AI tools for creators.
newThisWeek.specialty: Fast cinematic video generation with strong motion coherence
pros: Fast cinematic video generation with strong motion coherence

newThisWeek.name: Descript
newThisWeek.tagline: Edit video and audio like a text document
newThisWeek.description: Descript turns video and podcast editing into text editing — delete a word from the transcript and the video cuts itself. It includes AI-powered filler word removal, eye contact correction, studio-quality audio enhancement, and automatic clip generation for social media.
newThisWeek.specialty: Text-based video and podcast editing with AI enhancement
pros: Text-based video and podcast editing with ai enhancement
cons: Can be resource-intensive for large projects

tools.name: Kling 3.0
tools.tagline: The photorealism benchmark in AI video

It produces native 4K video at 60fps with the most realistic motion physics of any current model -- fluid motion, fabric draping, and particle behavior that look natural. Its unified multimodal architecture generates video, audio, and images together, enabling native lip-sync, multi-shot storyboarding, and element consistency.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: Cursor is a VS Code fork built around AI-powered code editing. It offers intelligent autocomplete, multi-file editing, codebase-aware chat, and the ability to write and refactor code using natural language commands. Rapidly adopted by developers for its seamless integration.

pros: Inline code completion and generation across all major ides

tools.description: Devin by Cognition AI is an autonomous coding agent that can plan, write, debug, and deploy code independently. It has its own terminal, browser, and code editor, and can handle complex multi-step engineering tasks from start to finish.

tools.name: Windsurf

tools.name: GameForge AI
tools.description: GameForge AI is a specialized coding assistant built for game developers working in Unity, Unreal Engine, and Godot. It understands game architecture patterns like ECS, scene graphs, and state machines out of the box. Get context-aware code completions, shader debugging, and performance profiling suggestions tailored to real-time applications.
tools.pricing: Free tier with 50 queries/day; Pro at $18/mo with unlimited queries and engine-specific fine-tuning
tools.specialty: Game development coding assistance across major engines and frameworks
pros: Deep integration with Unity, Unreal, and Godot project structures
Understands common game patterns like ECS, physics layers, and shader code
Built-in performance profiling suggestions for real-time applications
Generates boilerplate for networking, save systems, and input handling
cons: Free tier limited to 50 queries per day
Less effective for niche or custom engines
Shader suggestions occasionally produce deprecated syntax for older engine versions

tools.name: DevQuest
tools.tagline: Ship your game faster with AI that speaks your engine
tools.description: DevQuest is an AI coding companion designed exclusively for indie and professional game developers. It provides intelligent autocomplete, bug detection, and architecture recommendations grounded in real-world game development workflows. Whether you're writing C# for Unity or GDScript for Godot, DevQuest adapts to your stack and coding style.
tools.pricing: Free for open-source projects; Indie plan at $12/mo; Studio plan at $39/mo with team collaboration
tools.specialty: AI-assisted game programming with engine-aware context and debugging
pros: Free for open-source game projects with no query limits
Supports C#, C++, GDScript, Lua, and HLSL/GLSL out of the box
Inline documentation pulls from official engine docs automatically
Studio plan includes shared AI context across team members
cons: Team collaboration features locked behind the highest tier
Can struggle with highly custom rendering pipelines
No direct IDE plugin for Unreal — works via CLI and web interface only

tools.name: OpenClaw
tools.tagline: AI-powered code review and refactoring at your fingertips
tools.description: OpenClaw is an intelligent code analysis tool that automatically detects bugs, security vulnerabilities, and performance bottlenecks in your codebase. It provides actionable refactoring suggestions with one-click fixes and integrates seamlessly into popular IDEs and CI/CD pipelines. OpenClaw supports over 40 programming languages and learns from your team's coding patterns over time.
tools.pricing: Free tier for open-source projects; Pro at $19/mo per developer; Team at $49/mo per seat
tools.specialty: Automated code review, bug detection, and intelligent refactoring
pros: Supports 40+ programming languages with deep semantic analysis
Seamless integration with GitHub, GitLab, and all major IDEs
Free tier available for open-source and solo developers
Learns and adapts to your team's unique coding conventions
cons: Advanced security scanning only available on paid plans
Initial setup for large monorepos can be time-consuming
Occasionally flags false positives on unconventional code patterns

tools.tagline: Command your entire AI workforce from one dashboard
tools.description: OrchestrAI is a centralized platform for managing, orchestrating, and monitoring multiple AI agents and tools across your organization. It provides a unified control plane where you can chain AI workflows, set permissions, allocate resources, and track performance metrics for dozens of connected AI services. Built for teams that rely on a diverse AI stack and need a single source of truth.
tools.pricing: Free for up to 3 agents; Pro $49/mo for 25 agents; Enterprise custom pricing
tools.specialty: Multi-agent orchestration and AI workflow automation
pros: Supports 50+ AI integrations including OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and open-source models
Visual drag-and-drop workflow builder for chaining AI tasks
Granular access controls and usage monitoring per agent
Real-time logging and cost tracking across all connected services
cons: Steep learning curve for complex multi-agent pipelines
Free tier is limited to basic orchestration with no scheduling
Some niche AI tools require custom connector setup

tools.name: Nexus AI Hub
tools.tagline: One brain to rule them all
tools.description: Nexus AI Hub acts as a meta-AI layer that sits on top of your existing AI tools, routing tasks to the best model for the job automatically. It evaluates prompt complexity, cost, and latency to intelligently delegate work across GPT, Claude, Mistral, and other providers. Teams can define routing rules, fallback chains, and approval workflows to maintain full control over AI-driven operations.
tools.pricing: Free for 500 routed requests/mo; Growth $29/mo for 10,000 requests; Scale $99/mo unlimited
tools.specialty: Intelligent AI routing and model management
pros: Smart routing automatically picks the optimal model for each task
Significant cost savings by avoiding over-powered models on simple prompts
Built-in A/B testing to compare model outputs side by side
API-first design makes it easy to integrate into existing workflows
cons: Adds a small latency overhead due to the routing evaluation layer
Advanced routing logic requires YAML configuration knowledge
Limited built-in analytics on the free plan

tools.name: AgentForge
tools.tagline: Deploy, monitor, and govern autonomous AI agents at scale
tools.description: AgentForge is an enterprise-grade platform for building, deploying, and managing autonomous AI agents that can execute complex multi-step tasks. It offers a robust governance framework with guardrails, human-in-the-loop checkpoints, and audit trails for every agent action. Whether you need agents handling customer support, data pipelines, or code generation, AgentForge keeps them accountable and under control.
tools.pricing: Starter $79/mo for 10 agents; Business $199/mo for 50 agents; Enterprise custom
tools.specialty: Autonomous AI agent deployment and governance
pros: Comprehensive governance with guardrails, kill switches, and human approval gates
Pre-built agent templates for common business workflows
Detailed audit logs and compliance reporting for every agent decision
Supports both cloud-hosted and self-hosted agent deployments
cons: No free tier makes it hard to evaluate before committing
Primarily enterprise-focused with features that may overwhelm solo users
Agent debugging can be complex when workflows involve many chained steps

tools.name: Fitbod
tools.description: Fitbod uses AI trained on real workout data to generate personalized strength training plans that adapt based on your logged performance, available equipment, and recovery status. It automatically adjusts reps, sets, and weight using progressive overload principles, making it especially strong for gym-based muscle building.
tools.specialty: AI-driven personalized strength training and progressive overload
pros: Ai-driven personalized strength training and progressive ...

tools.name: Welling
tools.tagline: AI calorie counter and diet coach
tools.description: Welling is an AI-first food tracker and diet coach. Snap a photo of your meal or describe it in plain text, and the AI instantly estimates calories and macros without searching a food database. It provides personalized daily targets and coaching guidance.
tools.pricing: Free tier (AI meal logging + targets), Premium ~$20/mo or ~$100/yr
tools.specialty: AI photo and text-based food logging with instant macro estimation
pros: Ai photo and text-based food logging with instant macro e...

tools.name: MyFitnessPal
tools.tagline: The world's largest nutrition database, now with AI
tools.description: MyFitnessPal is the most established calorie and nutrition tracking app, now enhanced with AI photo recognition and ChatGPT Health integration. It boasts the world's largest food database, barcode scanning, and comprehensive macro and calorie tracking with social features.
tools.pricing: Free tier (with ads), Premium $19.99/mo or $79.99/yr, Premium+ $24.99/mo
tools.specialty: Comprehensive nutrition tracking with the world's largest food database
pros: Comprehensive nutrition tracking with the world's largest...

tools.name: FitnessAI
tools.description: FitnessAI's algorithm is trained on data from over 40,000 weightlifters across 3 years -- one of the largest weightlifting datasets in the world. It calculates the optimal set, rep, and weight combination for every exercise to maximize your strength gains.
tools.specialty: Data-driven weightlifting optimization using massive lifting datasets
pros: Data-driven weightlifting optimization using massive lift...

tools.name: Strongr Fastr
tools.tagline: AI nutrition, workouts, and meal planner
tools.description: Strongr Fastr combines AI-generated workout routines with personalized meal planning in a single platform. It matches you with a training routine based on your goals, schedule, and equipment, while generating customized meal plans with macro targets.
tools.specialty: Combined AI workout programming and meal planning
pros: Combined ai workout programming and meal planning

tools.name: Whoop
tools.description: Whoop uses AI to analyze heart rate variability, sleep quality, and daily strain to provide personalized recovery scores and training recommendations. Its AI coach adapts advice based on your physiological data.
tools.specialty: AI-driven physiological recovery and strain optimization
pros: Ai-driven physiological recovery and strain optimization

tools.name: Freeletics
tools.description: Freeletics uses AI to create personalized bodyweight workout plans that adapt based on your performance and feedback. No gym needed — it generates HIIT and strength workouts using just your body weight.
tools.specialty: Adaptive AI bodyweight and HIIT training
pros: Adaptive ai bodyweight and hiit training

tools.name: Khanmigo
tools.description: Khanmigo is a GPT-4-powered AI tutor built by Khan Academy, serving over 18 million students globally. Instead of giving direct answers, it uses the Socratic method to guide students through problems step by step. Studies show students using Khanmigo achieve 34% greater learning gains compared to traditional tutoring.
tools.pricing: Free for teachers, $4/mo or $44/yr for learners
tools.specialty: Socratic AI tutoring across math, science, humanities, and test prep
pros: Socratic ai tutoring across math, science, humanities, an...

tools.name: Google NotebookLM
tools.description: NotebookLM lets students upload course materials (PDFs, Google Docs, YouTube videos, websites) and then ask questions, generate summaries, create study guides, and produce flashcards with inline citations. It can also auto-generate podcast-style audio discussions and animated video explainers from your content.
tools.pricing: Free (100 notebooks, 50 sources each), Plus $7.99/mo, Pro $19.99/mo
tools.specialty: Source-grounded research with citations, audio and video explainers
pros: Source-grounded research with citations, audio and video ...

tools.name: Quizlet
tools.tagline: AI flashcards, tests, and study guides
tools.description: Quizlet has evolved from a flashcard platform into a full AI study suite. Its Q-Chat AI tutor uses the Socratic method, and its AI engine can turn uploaded notes, slides, or PDFs into structured flashcards, practice exams with customizable difficulty, and study guides.
tools.specialty: AI-generated flashcards, practice tests, and Socratic tutoring
pros: Ai-generated flashcards, practice tests, and socratic tut...
cons: Can be resource-intensive for large projects

tools.name: StudyFetch
tools.description: StudyFetch uses its AI assistant Spark.E to transform any uploaded study material into interactive study sets, flashcards, practice tests, and quizzes. Its Live Lecture feature captures and processes notes in real time, and the AI adapts to your study patterns.
tools.specialty: Real-time lecture capture and adaptive AI study set generation
pros: Real-time lecture capture and adaptive ai study set gener...

tools.name: Grammarly
tools.tagline: AI writing assistant for every student
tools.description: Grammarly is the most widely adopted AI writing assistant in education. Beyond grammar and spelling, it provides AI-powered sentence rewriting, tone detection, plagiarism checking, and 100 free AI prompts per month. Over 3,000 universities provide free Grammarly Pro access to students.
tools.pricing: Free tier (basics), Pro $12/mo billed annually, student discounts up to 50%
tools.specialty: AI writing assistance, grammar checking, and plagiarism detection
pros: Ai writing assistance, grammar checking, and plagiarism d...

tools.name: Photomath
tools.description: Photomath lets students snap a photo of any math problem and get step-by-step solutions instantly. It covers arithmetic through calculus, showing multiple solution methods and animated explanations.
tools.specialty: Camera-based math solving with step-by-step explanations
pros: Camera-based math solving with step-by-step explanations
cons: Can be resource-intensive for large projects

tools.name: Duolingo Max
tools.description: Duolingo Max adds GPT-4 powered features — Explain My Answer gives personalized grammar explanations, and Roleplay lets you practice conversations with AI characters in real-world scenarios.
tools.specialty: AI-enhanced language learning with conversation practice
pros: Ai-enhanced language learning with conversation practice

tools.name: Meshy
tools.description: Meshy generates textured 3D models from text prompts or images in minutes. It supports PBR textures, multiple art styles, and exports to all major 3D formats. Used by game developers and 3D artists to rapidly prototype assets.
tools.specialty: Text and image to textured 3D model generation
pros: Text and image to textured 3d model generation

tools.name: Tripo AI
tools.description: Tripo AI creates high-quality 3D models from text descriptions, single images, or multi-view photos in under 10 seconds. Its speed and quality make it one of the fastest 3D generation tools available.
tools.specialty: Ultra-fast 3D model generation from text and images
pros: Ultra-fast 3d model generation from text and images

tools.name: Spline AI
tools.description: Spline is a browser-based 3D design tool with AI generation built in. Create 3D scenes, animations, and interactive experiences using text prompts, then export to web, apps, or games.
tools.specialty: Browser-based 3D design with AI-assisted creation

tools.name: Kaedim
tools.description: Kaedim converts 2D images and concept art into production-ready 3D models. It combines AI generation with human quality checks to deliver clean, game-ready meshes with proper topology and UV maps.
tools.specialty: Production-quality 3D from 2D concept art

tools.name: CSM AI
tools.description: CSM (Common Sense Machines) generates interactive 3D worlds and objects from images, text, or sketches. Its models understand physical properties and can create entire scenes with proper lighting and physics.
tools.pricing: Free tier available, Pro plans from $20/mo
tools.specialty: 3D world and scene generation with physics understanding
pros: 3d world and scene generation with physics understanding
cons: Can be resource-intensive for large projects

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.description: ElevenLabs produces the most human-sounding AI speech available. Its voice cloning needs only seconds of audio to replicate any voice with emotional nuance, breathing patterns, and natural pacing.
tools.pricing: Free tier (10k chars/mo), Starter $5/mo, Creator $22/mo, Pro $99/mo
tools.specialty: Hyper-realistic voice cloning and multilingual text-to-speech
pros: Hyper-realistic voice cloning and multilingual text-to-sp...

tools.name: PlayHT
tools.description: PlayHT offers ultra-realistic text-to-speech with voice cloning capabilities. It supports 800+ AI voices across 140+ languages and can clone any voice from a 30-second sample.
tools.specialty: Multilingual AI voices with instant voice cloning

tools.name: Resemble AI
tools.description: Resemble AI provides enterprise-grade voice cloning with real-time generation, emotion control, and language dubbing. Used by media companies and game studios for scalable voice production.
tools.specialty: Enterprise voice cloning with emotion control

tools.name: Speechify
tools.tagline: Listen to anything with AI voices
tools.description: Speechify converts any text — articles, PDFs, emails, books — into natural-sounding audio. Its AI voices read content at adjustable speeds, making it popular for productivity and accessibility.
tools.specialty: Text-to-speech reader for documents and web content
pros: Text-to-speech reader for documents and web content

tools.name: WellSaid Labs
tools.description: WellSaid Labs creates broadcast-quality AI voiceovers for corporate training, marketing videos, and eLearning. Its voices are trained with professional voice actors and designed for enterprise use cases.
tools.specialty: Professional AI voiceover for enterprise content
pros: Professional ai voiceover for enterprise content
cons: Can be resource-intensive for large projects

tools.name: Consensus
tools.description: Consensus uses AI to search through 200M+ scientific papers and extract findings. Ask a research question in plain language and get evidence-based answers with citations to peer-reviewed studies.
tools.specialty: Evidence-based answers from scientific literature

tools.name: Elicit
tools.description: Elicit automates research workflows — finding papers, extracting data, summarizing findings, and synthesizing results across studies. It handles systematic literature reviews that would take weeks in hours.
tools.specialty: Automated systematic literature reviews and data extraction
pros: Automated systematic literature reviews and data extraction
cons: Can be resource-intensive for large projects

tools.name: Semantic Scholar
tools.description: Semantic Scholar by the Allen Institute uses AI to analyze millions of papers and surface the most relevant research. Its TLDR feature auto-summarizes papers, and its citation analysis reveals research impact and trends.
tools.specialty: AI paper summarization and citation impact analysis
pros: Ai paper summarization and citation impact analysis

tools.name: Connected Papers
tools.description: Connected Papers creates interactive visual graphs of related academic papers. Enter one paper and see its connections to prior and derivative works, making it easy to explore a research field visually.
tools.specialty: Visual research paper relationship mapping

tools.name: Scite
tools.description: Scite analyzes how papers cite each other — whether citations support, contrast, or simply mention findings. This citation context helps researchers evaluate the reliability and impact of research claims.
tools.specialty: Citation context analysis (supporting vs contrasting)

tools.name: Canva AI
tools.description: Canva AI brings Magic Studio tools — text-to-image, background remover, Magic Eraser, AI presentations, and brand-consistent design generation — to the world's most popular design platform, used by over 170 million people.
tools.pricing: Free tier available, Pro $13/mo, Teams $10/mo per person
tools.specialty: AI-enhanced graphic design accessible to non-designers
pros: Ai-enhanced graphic design accessible to non-designers

tools.name: Figma AI
tools.description: Figma AI adds intelligent features to the leading product design tool — auto-layout suggestions, content generation, component search, and AI-powered prototyping that turns descriptions into interactive designs.
tools.specialty: AI-enhanced product and UI/UX design workflows
pros: Ai-enhanced product and ui/ux design workflows

tools.name: Looka
tools.tagline: AI logo and brand kit generator
tools.description: Looka generates professional logos and complete brand identity kits from a few prompts about your business. Get hundreds of logo options, then customize colors, fonts, and layouts to create a cohesive brand.
tools.pricing: Free to generate, Basic $20 one-time, Premium $65 one-time
tools.specialty: AI logo design and brand identity generation
pros: Ai logo design and brand identity generation

tools.name: Photoroom
tools.description: Photoroom removes backgrounds, creates product photos, and generates marketing visuals instantly using AI. Used by millions of ecommerce sellers to create professional product images without a photo studio.
tools.specialty: AI product photography and background removal
pros: Ai product photography and background removal

tools.name: Vizcom
tools.description: Vizcom turns rough sketches into photorealistic product renders in real-time. Industrial designers draw concepts by hand and Vizcom generates polished renders with materials, lighting, and environments.
tools.specialty: Sketch-to-render for industrial and product design
pros: Sketch-to-render for industrial and product design

tools.name: AdCreative.ai
tools.description: AdCreative.ai generates high-converting ad creatives, banners, and social media posts using AI trained on millions of high-performing ads. It scores each creative for predicted conversion rate before you spend a dollar on ads.
tools.specialty: Conversion-optimized ad creative generation

tools.name: Synthesia

tools.pricing: Free demo, Starter $22/mo, Creator $67/mo, Enterprise custom
tools.specialty: AI avatar video production at scale
pros: Ai avatar video production at scale

tools.name: Surfer SEO
tools.description: Surfer SEO uses AI to analyze top-ranking pages and generate content guidelines for any keyword. Its AI writer creates SEO-optimized articles, and its audit tool identifies on-page improvements to boost rankings.
tools.specialty: AI content optimization for search engine rankings
pros: Ai content optimization for search engine rankings

tools.name: Persado
tools.description: Persado uses AI to generate and optimize marketing language — email subject lines, ad copy, push notifications — based on what motivates specific audiences to take action. Used by major brands like JPMorgan and Marks & Spencer.
tools.specialty: AI-optimized marketing language generation
